data.title: Yield-bearing stablecoin supply dropped 15% in Q2, ending a three-year uptrend, as sUSDe and sUSDS contracted. Treasury-backed products like BUIDL, USYC, and USDY saw growth.
data.description: During the second quarter, the supply of yield-bearing stablecoins decreased by 15% due to the decline of sUSDe and sUSDS. In contrast, Treasury-backed products such as BUIDL, USYC, and USDY experienced growth.

data.title: 134 ISIS-K crypto wallet addresses, incl. 131 Tron addresses, added to OFAC sanctions list. Over $1.4M in donations frozen by Tether.
data.description: A total of 134 cryptocurrency wallet addresses associated with ISIS-K have been included in the sanctions list by OFAC. Among these, 131 Tron addresses have received over $1.4 million in digital currency donations. This information was disclosed by Chainalysis.

data.title: HBCU ELI celebrates successful June residency, strengthening leadership pipeline for HBCUs
data.description: In a recent announcement on July 2, 2026, the HBCU Executive Leadership Institute at Clark Atlanta University confirmed the completion of its sixth Community of Fellows program. This initiative aims to groom upcoming presidents and executive leaders. The program is designed to equip individuals with the necessary skills and knowledge to excel in leadership roles. Clark Atlanta University continues to play a crucial role in developing future leaders through this program, with a focus on underrepresented minorities in executive positions.

data.title: Höegh Evi and Nord Gas Solutions Validate Ammonia-to-Hydrogen Cracking Technology for Floating Hydrogen Terminals
data.description: Located in Stord, Norway, on July 2, 2026, Höegh Evi and Nord Gas Solutions (previously known as Wartsila Gas Solutions) have effectively concluded performance testing for their innovative technology that converts ammonia into hydrogen at the Sustainable Energy pilot plant. This development marks a significant milestone in the field as it offers a promising solution to the growing demand for clean energy sources. The pilot cracker demonstrated impressive results, exhibiting an efficiency rate of over 90%, showcasing its potential to produce hydrogen on a large scale. The successful testing paves the way for further advancements in sustainable energy production, with the technology poised to make a substantial impact in the sector.

data.title: Vermiculus to Deliver 24/7 Clearing System for Prediction Markets to Leading Global Crypto Exchange
data.description: Stockholm, on July 2, 2026, Vermiculus, an independent technology provider for market infrastructure, has been chosen by a major crypto exchange to provide event-driven clearing services for prediction markets. This comes as part of their VeriClear®-based clearing solution, offering real-time capabilities. The exchange is one of the largest in the world, highlighting the significance of this partnership.

data.title: Hyperscale Data Buys 67 Bitcoin Bringing Bitcoin Treasury to Approximately 849 Bitcoin
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Las Vegas, Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS), a leading AI data center company focused on Bitcoin, disclosed its recent acquisition activity. Between June 30 and July 1, 2026, the Company procured a notable amount of assets.

data.title: SOCO® Launches Small-Pack Solidification Solutions for Healthcare and Emergency Sanitation Applications
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Los Angeles, a leading company, SOCO®, introduced innovative small-pack solidification solutions tailored for medical liquid waste management. These solutions aim to provide safer options for healthcare facilities, portable sanitation providers, and emergency response organizations handling liquid waste. The new products cater specifically to the need for efficient and secure management of medical liquid waste, addressing a growing concern in the industry. The launch signifies a proactive step towards enhancing safety and sustainability in waste management practices, marking a significant development in the sector.

data.title: Hisense Showcases 'Innovating a Brighter Life' Message at FIFA World Cup 2026™
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on July 2, 2026, Hisense, a prominent player in the global consumer electronics and home appliances sector, is set to showcase its commitment to 'Innovating a Brighter Life' to football enthusiasts worldwide. This initiative involves the placement of pitch-side LED messages during the FIFA World Cup 2026™, reaching a vast audience of fans throughout the event.

data.title: ValorC3 Launches Disaster Recovery Service to End Hypervisor Lock-In
data.description: ValorC3 Data Centers, based in Boise, Idaho, revealed the widespread accessibility of its Disaster Recovery as a Service (DRaaS) on July 2, 2026. This fully managed DRaaS safeguards Valor Cloud, ValorC3 IaaS, and any source environment. The service offers failover options from VMware, Hyper-V, or OpenStack. This DRaaS solution is equipped to protect critical data and applications, providing peace of mind for businesses.

data.title: California AI Company Unveils Praxis Human-First AI™
data.description: During the AI for Good Global Summit 2026 in Geneva on July 2, 2026, Praxis AI unveiled the Praxis Human-First Agentic Platform™, a new category aimed at safeguarding and enhancing trusted human intelligence. This innovative platform serves as the foundation for Human-First AI, combining technology, trust, intelligence, and economic structure. This advancement marks a significant milestone in the realm of artificial intelligence, setting the stage for a more human-centered approach in the integration of AI. This development showcases a profound shift towards prioritizing human intelligence within AI systems and signifies a crucial step towards building a more inclusive and ethically conscious AI ecosystem.

data.title: LinqAlpha Raises $22 Million to Build the Alpha Intelligence Layer for Global Public Markets
data.description: LinqAlpha is leveraging investors' research to develop AI agents that detect market-moving signals ahead of pricing. On July 2, 2026, in New York, LinqAlpha, a company specializing in AI for global public markets, revealed securing $22 million in funding.

data.title: Waters Corporation Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Milford, Massachusetts - On July 2, 2026, Waters Corporation (NYSE: WAT) announced plans for its Q2 2026 financial results conference call scheduled for Tuesday, August 4, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. EST. The event will be broadcast live on Waters' Investor Relations website.

data.title: Maple Leaf Foods to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 12th
data.description: Maple Leaf Foods Inc. (TSX: MFI) headquartered in Mississauga, Ontario, has announced that it will be revealing its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 on August 12, 2026, at 6:00 am ET. Investors and stakeholders can expect important insights during the release, which will be accompanied by a conference call.

data.title: Best AI Video Generator Tools (2026): CapCut Recognized for Fast AI-Powered Video Creation by Software Experts
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Software Experts lauded CapCut in their latest review of top AI Video Generator Tools for its swift AI-driven video production capabilities. The platform's efficiency in aiding creators, small businesses, educators, e-commerce vendors, and marketing squads was particularly emphasized.
